## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing outcome.

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pyright --outputjson`
- [ ] GUI smoke coverage if GUI code changed

## Risk Review

- [ ] Apply/undo behavior reviewed
- [ ] Manifest or verify impact reviewed
- [ ] Config migration impact reviewed
- [ ] Changelog updated when needed
